summary: Rewrite the Go module path to github.com/mvanhorn/printing-press-library/library/food-and-dining/jimmy-johns and update all internal imports.
reason: The npm installer resolves install targets from the published module path (`go install <module>/cmd/<binary>@latest`). A bare `module jimmy-johns-pp-cli` declaration left `npx ... install jimmy-johns` running `go install jimmy-johns-pp-cli/cmd/jimmy-johns-pp-cli@latest`, which Go rejects as a malformed/undownloadable path. Found by codex review.
